brand.name: Green Haven Landscaping
brand.headline: Outdoor spaces kept sharp year-round
brand.footer_blurb: Outdoor spaces kept sharp year-round across the Denver metro.

homepage.hero_title: Lawn care and landscape upkeep without the hassle
homepage.hero_subtitle: Weekly maintenance, seasonal cleanups, and curb-appeal upgrades delivered by a reliable local crew.
homepage.services_intro: Weekly maintenance, cleanup work, and curb-appeal upgrades handled by one reliable crew.
homepage.service1_desc: Scheduled mowing, edging, trimming, and cleanup to keep your yard consistently sharp.
homepage.service2_desc: Spring and fall visits that clear debris, refresh beds, and reset your outdoor space.
homepage.service3_desc: Mulch, plantings, pruning, and detail work that improve curb appeal fast.
homepage.about_body: Green Haven Landscaping helps busy homeowners keep their yards clean, healthy, and presentation-ready without chasing down unreliable crews. Our team is insured, detail-oriented, and focused on consistent results from the first visit to the last.
homepage.review1_text: Excellent service, highly professional. Would recommend to anyone.
homepage.review2_text: Outstanding results. Will definitely be using them again.
homepage.review3_text: Fast, reliable, and thorough. Exactly what I needed.
homepage.cta_subtext: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation quote.

about.subtitle: Local. Reliable. Detail-driven.
about.body:
Green Haven Landscaping was built for homeowners who want dependable yard care without the usual no-shows and rushed work. We started by helping neighbors with routine lawn upkeep and quickly grew into a crew known for clean lines, clear communication, and consistent follow-through.

Today we handle recurring maintenance, seasonal cleanups, and small landscape refreshes across the Denver metro. We keep our service list focused so every job gets the same level of attention and the same standard of finish.
about.value1_desc: We never cut corners. Every job gets our full attention.
about.value2_desc: We show up when we say we will. Your time matters.

services.intro: Recurring care and one-time cleanup work with straightforward pricing.
services.cat1_intro: Choose the level of upkeep that fits your property and schedule.
services.pkg1_desc: Mowing, edging, trimming, and blow-off for small to midsize residential lots.
services.pkg2_desc: Weekly maintenance plus bed detailing, hedge touch-ups, and seasonal adjustments.
services.pkg3_desc: Comprehensive upkeep for larger properties with priority scheduling and detail work.
services.cat2_intro: One-time visits and upgrade work for the moments your yard needs extra attention.
services.addon1_desc: Leaf removal, cutbacks, debris haul-off, and a clean reset for the season.
services.addon2_desc: Fresh mulch, bed edging, and visual cleanup to improve curb appeal quickly.
services.step1_desc: Fill out our contact form or call us. We respond within hours.
services.step2_desc: Our team shows up on time and delivers as promised.
services.step3_desc: We don't leave until you're happy with the result.

contact.page_intro: Fill out the form and we'll respond within a few hours.
contact.address: Serving Denver, Lakewood, Littleton, and nearby communities

gallery.page_intro: Browse completed jobs from our team.

faq.page_intro: Everything you need to know before booking.
faq.a1: Pricing depends on the service and scope. We provide free quotes — contact us for an exact price.
faq.a2: Timing varies by service. We'll give you an estimate when you book.
faq.a3: We serve Denver, Lakewood, Littleton, and nearby communities across the metro area.
faq.a4: Yes, we are fully insured. Your property is protected.
faq.a5: We accept cash, check, and all major credit cards.
faq.q6: Do I need to be home?
faq.a6: For most services, no. We'll coordinate access and keep you updated.
